---
name: Skill improvement
about: Propose a reusable skill, guide, mapping, or adaptation improvement.
title: "[Skill]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

Do not include secrets, tokens, private keys, customer source code, private
prompts, confidential materials, regulated data, local absolute paths, raw
logs, raw screenshots, raw evidence bundles, generated private bundles, copied
worktrees, or vulnerability exploit details.

## Goal

What should the skill, guide, or adaptation flow help users do?

## Layer

Choose one: universal, architecture, stack, other policy.

## Portability

Explain why this belongs in the selected layer and does not copy project-only
rules.

## Proposed Gate

What evidence or review gate should prove the improvement works?
